Task description and verifier.py explicit checks
Task description and verifier.py explicit checks against SeisComP configuration dump
Task description and verifier.py regex validation against SeisComP trigger configuration

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires configuring the SeisComP 'exec' module to use the target script /home/ga/scripts/log_origin.sh, which appends to the target log /home/ga/origin_audit.log. The module must be subscribed to the 'LOCATION' messaging group and triggered by the 'Origin' message class. These values are synthetically mandated by the task description and rigorously verified by the verifier scripts.
